violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee certified in food safety management must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Thermometers are lacking inside the 2-door lowboy, the front 2-door reach-in, and the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep unit were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in condenser fans, the walk-in shelving, and the dish racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
The walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Foods are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep unit were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
The floor in the cook/grill area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The walls throughout the kitchen observed with an accumulation of grease, soil residue, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024
